title: Chicken over the coals – 3 ingredients

seo.title: Chicken over the coals - 3 ingredients - Marinda Kook

html:
Sometimes the simplest food is the tastiest. That's what I did with last night's braai chicken. It was delicious and you could taste that you were eating chicken! There was no wondering what was hiding under the sauce. There's no recipe with measurements here. Just what feels right to your hand to do.

YOU NEED:

  • chicken braai pieces of your choice
  • Portuguese spice
  • olive oil
  • lemon juice

NOW:

  1. drizzle the chicken with the olive oil and lemon juice
  2. sprinkle plenty of spice over the chicken
  3. rub the spices, oil and lemon juice well into the chicken – use your hands
  4. leave in the fridge for at least an hour
  5. braai the chicken slowly over medium coals and turn regularly

This is honest, genuine food. Make enough so there's some left over for tomorrow's lunch at work.
